children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: This subpart shall not apply to any alien individual who is a bona fide resident of Puerto Rico, Guam, American Samoa, or the Northern Mariana Islands during the entire taxable year and such alien shall be subject to the tax imposed by section 1.
Guam, American Samoa, and the Northern Mariana Islands, see section 931, and
